judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the required eye-exposure sequence: flush immediately while holding lids open, remove contacts, continue flushing for at least 15 minutes, and get immediate medical attention. Added mention of saline, eye rotation, and bringing label/SDS does not change the core plan or create danger.
